Don’t be fooled by the $600 MSRP it’s been given by the brand, as it’s only really been seen climbing as high as $353 since 2026 began, with the year also regularly seeing it discounted to this same rate. items.title: Personal update: I've joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative. I am very excited to join the team here and get back to R&D. I remain deeply passionate about education and plan to resume my work on it in time. (Andrej Karpathy/@karpathy)
items.summary:
Andrej Karpathy / @karpathy:
Personal update: I've joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative. I am very excited to join the team here and get back to R&D. I remain deeply passionate about education and plan to resume my work on it in time.

items.title: This slim 10,000mAh 45W power bank plugs right into the wall and has a retractable USB-C cable, now down to just $18 (55% off)
items.summary:
INIU 45W 10,000mAh Power Bank and Wall Charger with Retractable USB-C Cable

Buy for $18.50 (Reg. $40)

Clip the on-page 49% off coupon.

What we love

This slim, versatile power bank packs a surprising amount of functionality into a compact package. Alongside its 10,000mAh capacity and 45W output, it features a built-in retractable USB-C cable and integrated AC prongs, letting you plug it directly into a wall outlet. Even when the battery itself is drained, it can still deliver up to 30W of passthrough charging to devices like a MacBook Air, iPad, iPhone, and more.

items.title: Now live: New Nintendo Switch 2 bundle with included game might be the best deal we see all year
items.summary:
While we are still featuring loads of notable deals on Switch and Switch 2 games below, the new Nintendo Switch 2: Choose Your Game Bundle is taking over today’s games roundup. Considering the imminent price hike inbound on Switch 2 consoles, and how unlikely it is going to be to see deals on Nintendo’s latest console this year, we wanted to make sure the Choose Your Game Bundle was front and center.

You’re getting a Switch 2 and one of three games – Mario Kart World, Donkey Kong Bananza, or Pokémon Pokopia – at $499.99 shipped. As of right now that’s $20 or $30 off depending on which game you choose, but once the price goes up on Switch 2 in a few months, this will actually be as much as $80 off. If you’re going to buy a new Switch 2 this year, this limited time bundle might be your best option. 

Update: The new Nintendo Switch 2: Choose Your Game Bundle is also now available at GameStop.
